import { Accordion } from "@msviderok/base-ui-solid/accordion";
import {
  createMemo,
  createSignal,
  splitProps,
  type ComponentProps,
} from "solid-js";

type Props = ComponentProps<typeof Accordion.Root> & {
  className?: string;
};

export function FancyAccordion(props: Props) {
  const [local, rest] = splitProps(props, ["class"]);
  const [count, setCount] = createSignal(0);
  const label = createMemo(() => `Section ${count() + 1}`);

  return (
    <Accordion.Root class={local.class} defaultValue={["details"]} {...rest}>
      <Accordion.Item value="details">
        <Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Trigger
            class="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2"
            onClick={() => setCount(count() + 1)}
          >
            <span>{label()}</span>
            <svg
              aria-hidden="true"
              class="size-4 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              stroke-linecap="round"
              stroke-linejoin="round"
              stroke-width={2}
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6" />
            </svg>
          </Accordion.Trigger>
        </Accordion.Header>
        <Accordion.Panel style={{ "font-size": "12px", opacity: "0.5" }}>
          Accordion content
        </Accordion.Panel>
      </Accordion.Item>
    </Accordion.Root>
  );
}
